source: Etihad route network, April 2026. Sources: etihad.com/en/news (Charlotte launch announcement 4 May 2026); Wikipedia List of Etihad Airways destinations; Simple Flying coverage of 2026 expansion.
rule: If flight destination IATA is in `airports`, apply US-CBP adjustment: A380 adds +10 min, Wide Body adds +15 min, applied to CBC Briefing Completed and Bus Departs CBC milestones only. Narrow Body does not serve US destinations.
